Godsend (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $14,334,645Details
International Box Office $2,539,280
Worldwide Box Office $16,873,925
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,800,617 (47.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.11 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:85.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,323 opening theaters/2,323 max. theaters, 2.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $27,607,459

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 30th, 2004 (Wide) by Lionsgate
International Releases: July 8th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: August 17th, 2004 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence including frightening images, a scene of sexuality and some thematic material
Running Time: 102 minutes
Plot point: Child Murderer, Cloning, Death of a Son or Daughter, Mental Illness, Night Terrors, Surprise Twist
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Lionsgate
Production Countries: Canada, United States
Languages: English
